name: Browse projects dashboard to run detail
successCriteria: User can navigate from projects dashboard → project detail → run detail with report and metrics visible

steps.description: Click agent-hub project card to drill into project detail
Scroll to see run history list
Click first run card to view run detail

reviewerNotes: This is the core read-only drill-down flow. Layer B: pay attention to information hierarchy on each page — is the most important content visible without scrolling? Check card hover states and visual affordances. The transition between pages should feel like progressive disclosure (overview → detail → deep detail). H1 (visibility) should show clear page identity at each level. H6 (recognition over recall) — can the user orient themselves at each level without breadcrumbs?

failureModes.expected: empty state card with CLI instructions
